sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105826" key="tubi/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τυβίον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τύβος</orth>, sine expl., Sch.D.T.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:p.195H" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.195H.</biblScope> </bibl> (Perh. connected with <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡμιτύβιον.</foreign>)</entryFree>
